item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, saya menyadari bahwa keseimbangan antara kedua aspek ini sangat penting agar tidak terjadi diskriminasi atau ketidakadilan dalam masyarakat.

notes: Both agents move toward balance while retaining their cultural anchors. Agent A starts society-leaning and later adds stronger anti-discrimination and rights-violation caveats. Agent B starts rights-first and later acknowledges collective needs and international/cultural context, but continues rejecting unlimited sacrifice of personal rights for social stability.
